name: Spermidine MCI sleep autophagy trial is recruiting with no posted results
summary: NCT07383311 is directly relevant spermidine/autophagy registry context, but it is recruiting with no posted results and cannot change the current public stage.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT07383311 as a recruiting randomized spermidine trial in mild cognitive impairment with sleep, alertness, memory, polyamine, and eIF5A hypusination endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: People with mild cognitive impairment due to Alzheimer's disease
time_horizon: Twelve-week intervention with estimated study completion in May 2029
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment is 76; registry status is recruiting; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The disease-specific MCI context is not a general aging or LEV-relevant outcome.
The autophagy-related endpoints are secondary blood-marker measures.
